Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.application.meteo.filters

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    DistanceWindFilter
    Application-specific MessageFilterI.ValueFilterI that accepts a WindDataI payload only when its WindDataI.getPosition() is within maxDistance of a reference position.

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
